$comment: Design token file for the Mobile Date Picker - Dates (day cell) component
$description: Component tokens for the Mobile Dates cell - the individual day cell rendered inside the Date Picker calendar grid. Covers state (Default, Selected, Disabled), range membership (Range), range endpoints (Range Start, Range End), and the optional today indicator dot. Atomic component - nested inside Date Picker Mobile which references it rather than redefining these tokens. Figma Reference: Node ID 191-35687

$component.name: Dates
$component.description: The single day cell used within the mobile date picker calendar grid. Shows a numeric day label, an optional today dot, an optional in-range highlight, and switches background/text treatment across default, selected, and disabled states.
$component.structure: 44x44 square cell containing a centered day label. Selected state renders a filled circle. Range members render a subtle fill; range start/end render a half-capsule highlight beneath the selected circle. Optional today dot sits at the top of the cell.

state.default: Rest day cell with subtle fill

variants.range-start: First day of a selected range (leading half-capsule)
variants.range-end: Last day of a selected range (trailing half-capsule)

usage.contexts: Date Picker Mobile calendar grid, range selection
usage.features: Selected circle, in-range highlight, range end caps, today dot, disabled days

container.$comment: Cell dimensions, radii, and internal alignment

size.description: Mobile date cell width and height - lg - 44px

gap.description: Mobile date cell internal content gap - sm - 10px

default.description: Mobile date cell radius for default and disabled states - xs - 4px

selected.description: Mobile date cell radius for the selected circle - full - 1000px (pill/circle)

range-cap.description: Mobile date range start/end capsule corner radius - full - 1000px. Note: Figma specifies 24px; no exact radius token exists (scale jumps 20px to 1000px). Using full to preserve the pill-cap intent - flag for a token follow-up

default.description: Mobile date cell default background - neutral subtle - #f2f4f7

range.description: Mobile date cell in-range background - primary subtle - #d1e0ff

selected.description: Mobile date cell selected circle background - primary intense - #00359e

disabled.description: Mobile date cell disabled background - transparent

default.description: Mobile date cell default label color - neutral body - #475467

range.description: Mobile date cell in-range label color - neutral body - #475467

selected.description: Mobile date cell selected label color - neutral base - #ffffff

disabled.description: Mobile date cell disabled label color - neutral inactive - #d0d5dd

default.description: Mobile date cell default/disabled label typography - 13px medium

selected.description: Mobile date cell selected label typography - 13px semibold

size.description: Mobile date cell today indicator dot size - 8px

default.description: Mobile date cell today dot on default background - primary - #155eef

on-selected.description: Mobile date cell today dot on selected background - neutral base - #ffffff

color.description: Mobile date range start/end capsule highlight behind the selected circle - primary subtle - #d1e0ff
